title: Myte
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''myte''' was a small [[Insect/Legends|insect]] form of life native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. Their evolution produced a specialized defense, allowing them to appear as blueish stones, in order to hide among rocks to avoid being eaten by other predators.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
